news.title: Dearborn Fordson高中珍贵壁画从墙面剥落
news.summary_en: A historic mural inside Fordson High School's library is more than halfway detached from the wall, and preservationists are hoping to save it.
news.original_title: Rare mural peeling off wall of Dearborn's Fordson High
news.summary_cn: 位于Dearborn市Fordson高中的珍贵历史壁画正面临剥落的危险。这幅壁画具有重要的文化和历史价值，学校社区正在寻求保护和修复方案，以保存这一珍贵的艺术遗产。

news.title: Plymouth Canton Educational Park students walk out to oppose ICE
news.summary_en: Students walked out of class at Plymouth, Canton and Salem High Schools on Wednesday, March 25, morning to support immigrants and oppose ICE.

news.summary_cn: Students walked out of class at Plymouth, Canton and Salem High Schools on Wednesday, March 25, morning to support immigrants and oppose ICE.

news.title: 底特律女子承认参与250万美元学生援助诈骗案
news.summary_en: Investigators began looking into the case after school officials noticed a series of applications from the same online high school.
news.original_title: Detroit woman pleads guilty to $2.5 million student aid scam
news.summary_cn: 一名底特律女子在联邦法庭承认参与一项涉及250万美元的学生财政援助诈骗计划。该诈骗涉及虚假申请和身份盗用，损害了联邦学生援助项目的完整性。

news.title: Goodrich将信念转化为现实，创造完美不败赛季
news.summary_en: Goodrich girls basketball finished the season 29-0 and the champions of MHSAA Division 2 with a 55-44 win over Tecumseh.
news.original_title: Goodrich turns belief into reality with dominant undefeated season
news.summary_cn: Goodrich高中女子篮球队以完美的不败战绩结束赛季，展现了团队的信念、努力和卓越表现。球队在整个赛季中保持连胜，最终夺得州冠军。

news.title: Goodrich女子篮球队领取MHSAA第二分区州冠军奖牌
news.summary_en: Goodrich beat Tecumseh 55-44 in the MHSAA Division 2 girls basketball state championship on Saturday, March 21.
news.original_title: Goodrich girls basketball receives MHSAA Division 2 state title medals
news.summary_cn: Goodrich高中女子篮球队在夺得MHSAA第二分区州冠军后正式领取冠军奖牌。这是该校篮球队历史上的重要成就，表彰了球员们整个赛季的出色表现。

news.title: Goodrich girls basketball finishes perfect season with MHSAA D-2 title
news.summary_en: Goodrich beat Tecumseh, 55-44, in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 2 state championship on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.
news.original_title: Goodrich girls basketball finishes perfect season with MHSAA D-2 title
news.summary_cn: Goodrich beat Tecumseh, 55-44, in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 2 state championship on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.

news.title: Autry的英雄之旅以心碎结束
news.summary_en: Muskegon beat Detroit Renaissance 34-29 in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 1 state championship game on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.
news.original_title: Autry's heroic Detroit Renaissance run ends with heartbreak
news.summary_cn: Detroit Renaissance高中的Autry在州锦标赛中展现了英雄般的表现，但球队最终遗憾落败。尽管未能夺冠，Autry的出色表现赢得了广泛赞誉。

news.title: Muskegon女子篮球队领取MHSAA第一分区州冠军奖牌
news.summary_en: Muskegon beat Detroit Renaissance 34-29 in the Division 1 girls basketball state championship game on Saturday, March 21.
news.original_title: Muskegon girls basketball receives MHSAA Division 1 state title medals
news.summary_cn: Muskegon高中女子篮球队正式领取MHSAA第一分区州冠军奖牌。这是该校女子篮球项目的重要成就，表彰了球队在整个赛季中的卓越表现。

news.title: Muskegon击败Detroit Renaissance夺得MHSAA第一分区女子篮球冠军
news.summary_en: Muskegon beat Detroit Renaissance 34-29 in the MHSAA girls basketball Division 1 state championship on Saturday, March 21 in East Lansing.
news.original_title: Muskegon outlasts Detroit Renaissance for MHSAA D-1 girls basketball title
news.summary_cn: Muskegon高中女子篮球队在激烈的比赛中击败Detroit Renaissance高中，夺得MHSAA第一分区州冠军。比赛异常激烈，Muskegon展现了顽强的意志力和出色的团队合作。

news.title: UP community travels 6 hours to watch Ishpeming girls basketball win D-4 title
news.summary_en: Ishpeming girls basketball won the MHSAA girls basketball Division 4 state title, supported by fans who traveled 400 miles through a snowstorm.

news.title: Ishpeming篮球队被授予MHSAA第四分区冠军奖牌
news.summary_en: Ishpemingbeat Portland St. Patrick 48-28 in the Division 4 girls basketball state championship game on Saturday, March 21.
news.original_title: Ishpeming basketball presented with MHSAA Division 4 title medals

news.title: Mya Hemmer's historic game anchors Ishpeming to MHSAA girls D-4 title
news.summary_en: Ishpeming girls basketball wins the MHSAA Division 4 finals over Portland St. Patrick led by Mya Hemmer's 18 points, 17 rebounds, 9 blocks, 6 steals.
news.original_title: Mya Hemmer's historic game anchors Ishpeming to MHSAA girls D-4 title
